It might not just be a simple jealousy issue.

Wait, but he's otherwise normal, no hallucinations or other inappropriate behaviors.

So, delusional disorder, specifically delusional possessiveness or jealousy, seems to fit here.

So, putting it together, the most likely diagnosis is delusional disorder, specifically the persecutory type, since his delusions are centered around being persecuted by his wife and friend.
